title: Sarko
description: A tailored web project demonstrating immersive and responsive design principles.
overview: Sarko is a modern web experience meant to demonstrate how to elegantly adapt interactive applications seamlessly across all device dimensions without compromising on aesthetics or performance.
content: Sarko is a modern web experience meant to demonstrate how to elegantly adapt interactive applications seamlessly across all device dimensions without compromising on aesthetics or performance.

challengesStructured.issue: Creating a unified layout that adapts perfectly from 4k monitors to tiny mobile screens.
challengesStructured.solution: Leveraged modern CSS Grid and custom container queries for fluid adjustments.

outcomes: Achieved pixel-perfect responsive scaling across 15+ tested device physical profiles.
Sub-second load times due to aggressive asset optimization.
